name: Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, salt, and sifted flour in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add water to the egg mixture while continuously beating with an egg whip.
3. Add milk and continue beating until the batter is smooth and bubbly.
4. Pour the batter into hot, well-oiled popover pans that have been preheated.
5. Bake in a very hot oven (230øC) for 40-60 minutes or until light and dry. Serve 6 servings.
Florence Taft Eaton, Concord, MA.
